examples:
Command Example
!email email=example.gmail.com
Human Readable Output
6. Check a domain
Checks the reputation of a domain in ThreatQ.
Notice: Submitting indicators using this command might make the indicator data publicly available. See the vendor’s documentation for more details.
Base Command
domain

!email email=example.gmail.com
Human Readable Output
6. Check a domain
Checks the reputation of a domain in ThreatQ.
Notice: Submitting indicators using this command might make the indicator data publicly available. See the vendor’s documentation for more details.
Base Command
domain
Input
name: domain

outputs.description: The value of the indicator. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor of the indicator.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The type of the indicator. DBotScore.Score The DBot Score of the indicator.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The name of the domain. Domain.Malicious.Vendor The vendor of the malicious domain.
outputs.name: Domain.Name

outputs.description: The description of the malicious domain. ThreatQ.Indicator.ID The ID of the indicator.
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The value of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Source.ID The source ID of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Value

outputs.description: The source name of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.ID The attribute ID of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Source.Name

outputs.description: The attribute value of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.Name The attribute name of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.Value

outputs.description: Date The creation date of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.UpdatedAt
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.CreatedAt

outputs.description: The last update date of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Status The status of the indicator.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The ThreatQ score of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Description The description of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.TQScore
